description: CompositionNavy blue V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding in embroidered and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careonly hand wash inside out in cold water separately using a mild detergentColour may transferDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsGet on the road to freedom in this t-shirt from wrangler – the brand that grew to tremendous heights to clothe the world in fabulous wear for a century. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
